description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The ear cups are circular and feature a light gray exterior with black padding, providing comfort and noise isolation. The headband is constructed from a sturdy, dark material and is reinforced at the joints where it connects to the ear cups. On the outer side of each ear cup, there is a subtle atomic symbol design, suggesting a modern or possibly science-themed aesthetic. The headphones appear to be wireless, as there are no visible cables or connectors. The overall build suggests durability and comfort for extended use in urban environments such as parks, streets, or public transport.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with large, cushioned ear cups and a sturdy, padded headband, featuring a light gray and black color scheme with atomic symbols on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the full arch of the padded headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup with the atomic symbol and the robust headband connection.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetry of the ear cups and headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ear cup with the atomic symbol and the headband's attachment.
